function v(v)return e[v-(216807+-175491)]end for v,s in ipairs({{-351758+351759,-943534+944153};{-336743-(-336744);230766+-230644},{-215696-(-215819);-691317-(-691936)}})do while return(function(e,u,g,i,A,q,H,z,r,S,x,C,N,d,k,a,j,E,V,o,F,s)a,E,S,F,k,s,r,V,o,j,z,d,x,C,N=function(e)local v,s=830503+-830502,e[-219148-(-219149)]while s do end,{},function(e,v)local u=N(v)local g=function()return s(e,{},v,u)end return g end,function(s,g,i,A)local
